name: Wu Hsiang Chi (Five Spice Chicken)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place chicken in a shallow glass or plastic dish.
2. Mix the remaining ingredients in a bowl.
3. Pour the mixture over the chicken, covering it completely.
4. Cover and refrigerate for at least 1 hour, stirring occasionally to ensure the marinade is evenly distributed.
5. Remove the chicken from the marinade and set aside. Reserve the marinade.
6. Place the chicken in an ungreased oblong baking dish measuring 12 x 7 1/2 x 2 inches.
7. Brush the reserved marinade over the chicken.
8. Cook uncovered at 350°F (175°C) in the oven, brushing with the marinade once or twice, until the thickest pieces of chicken are thoroughly cooked, about 1 hour.
